items.title: NWSL Power Rankings: Portland Thorns take top spot...
items.summary: After 6 matchdays, we have a new No. 1 as the Portland Thorns took two wins in a week to lead ESPN's NWSL Power Rankings, though the Washington Spirit are hot on their heels.
